basics.name: Jake Walker
basics.label: Computer Science Student
basics.summary: I am an undergraduate student at University of Hawai'i at Mānoa pursuing Bachelor of Science in Mathematics and Computer Science. I expect to graduate in Spring 2024.

courses: ICS 211 - Introduction to Computer Science II (Java)
ICS 111 - Introduction to Computer Science I (Java)
MATH 307 - Linear Algebra and Differential Equations

work.summary: Managed vacation rental reservations and assisted in regular maintenance activities of over 30 properties including luxury condo, hotel condo, residential condo units, villas, and apartments.

awards.title: S-STEM Scholarship
awards.summary: A grant-funded program sponsored by the National Science Foundation that will award scholarships to academically talented students.

awards.title: UHM CC Transfer Merit Award
awards.summary: Scholarships awarded to incoming transfer students from University of Hawaii Community Colleges with a minimum overall GPA of 3.0.
